block_00: And 3 basic steps to start short-term trading
block_03: Hi there! Christmas is very close. In this digest, we'll talk about candlestick patterns, holiday tournaments, and, of course, statistics.
block_06: 3 Steps For Trading Stocks on Short Time Frames
block_07: Many traders prefer short-term trading to investing, but finding the suitable stocks, as well as considering risks, is crucial for this type of trading. We recommend you to learn a few basic steps if you’re going to start investing with short–term trading.
block_09: 6 Price Action Candlestick Patterns for Every Trader
block_10: Read more about candlestick patterns and how they can help you understand price formation. Use them to track market cycles and patterns.
block_12: What Is Forex? A Tutorial for Novice Traders

block_15: Most Profitable Trade of the Week
block_43: Every Christmas, Walt Disney gave his housekeeper Thelma Howard shares of Disney stock as a bonus. By the time of her death in 1994, Thelma had accumulated about 193,000 Disney shares, which would be worth $32,674,900 today.*
